sections.title: Jurisdiction
sections.content: The District Court has jurisdiction to hear and determine any criminal proceedings for offences punishable by imprisonment not exceeding 10 years, and certain other matters.

sections.title: Sentencing jurisdiction
sections.content: The District Court has jurisdiction to impose sentences including imprisonment up to 10 years, fines up to $100,000, community-based sentences, and other orders.

sections.title: Right of appeal
sections.content: A defendant may appeal to the High Court against conviction or sentence. The appeal must be filed within 20 working days unless an extension is granted.
